organization: Kinetic Gain synthetic contact center estate

queues.name: Enterprise renewal escalation
queues.narrative: Renewal-impact calls are waiting too long, bouncing across teams, and creating avoidable churn risk.
queues.nextAction: Protect renewal queue staffing, reduce transfer paths, and route severe sentiment drops to named account owners.

queues.name: Billing dispute queue
queues.narrative: Billing friction is visible in repeat contacts and escalations before revenue leakage is reconciled.
queues.nextAction: Cluster repeat billing drivers and move high-value disputes into a same-day resolution lane.

queues.name: Technical support triage
queues.narrative: Support triage is stable but has enough repeat contact pressure to track weekly.
queues.nextAction: Route repeat-contact drivers to product owners and keep staffing coverage above 80 percent.

queues.name: Implementation scheduling
queues.narrative: Scheduling is inside tolerance and mainly needs trend monitoring.
queues.nextAction: Keep implementation blockers visible by account and prevent delayed starts from becoming renewal risk.
